name: GDN-Hybrid: Gated DeltaNet + Sliding Window Attention
blurb: Non-record introduction of GDN-Hybrid: replaces transformer backbone with Gated DeltaNet (delta-rule linear recurrence) + Sliding Window Attention. Layout: [GDN×5] → [SWA] → [GDN×5] → [SWA_shared]. 33.86M params, 512-dim, SP1024, int6 GPTQ + zstd-22. No TTT. Corrected val_bpb 1.2097 (3-artifact mean, stride=512). Fixes BPB double-count from closed PR #1545.
author: Abhishek8108
